title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.540 - Powers and duties of director, delegation authorized
text:
217.540.  Powers and duties of director, delegation authorized. — The director is hereby authorized and directed to do all things necessary or incidental to the carrying out of a compact prescribed by section 217.525 in every particular and he may in his discretion delegate this authority.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 114, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408)
